title: Code of Conduct and Workplace Behavior Expectations
text:
Q: What are the expectations for workplace behavior and the code of conduct?
A: Our company expects all employees to uphold a high standard of conduct and professionalism at all times. This includes treating colleagues, clients, and stakeholders with respect, maintaining a collaborative environment, and adhering to all company policies. Employees should refrain from any form of harassment, discrimination, or bullying. Additionally, punctuality and reliability are crucial; employees are expected to arrive on time and meet deadlines. If you witness or experience any behavior that violates our code of conduct, please report it to your supervisor or the HR department within 24 hours. For more detailed information, refer to the Employee Handbook or contact HR at hr@company.com. Regular training sessions on workplace behavior will be held quarterly to reinforce these expectations.
